requirement_topic.en: DSO / SEPS Grid Connection — 230/400 V 50 Hz Slovak National Grid
requirement_topic.zh: DSO / SEPS并网接入——230/400 V 50 Hz斯洛伐克国家电网
requirement_topic.zht: DSO / SEPS併網接入——230/400 V 50 Hz斯洛伐克國家電網

summary.en: Slovakia's electricity supply system is operated at transmission level by SEPS (Slovenská elektrizačná prenosová sústava) and at distribution level by regional DSOs (Západoslovenská distribučná, Stredoslovenská distribučná, Východoslovenská distribučná), all under ÚRSO (Regulatory Office for Network Industries) sector oversight. The low-voltage context is 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz. That is the same frequency as China but a different nominal voltage from China's 220/380 V baseline. Grid-connected charger projects should be treated as site-specific electrical installations requiring DSO supply-capacity review, protection coordination, metering, earthing, harmonic and power-quality review, commissioning, and written project acceptance before energisation. EU Regulation (EU) 2016/631 (RfG) applies for installations above the Slovak thresholds.
summary.zh: 斯洛伐克电力供应系统在输电层面由SEPS（斯洛伐克电力传输系统）运营，配电层面由各地区DSO（西斯洛伐克分销、中斯洛伐克分销、东斯洛伐克分销）运营，均受ÚRSO（网络行业监管办公室）监管。低压电网环境为230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其频率与中国相同，但标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。并网充电桩项目应作为特定场址电气安装处理，需在通电前完成DSO供电容量审查、保护配合、计量、接地、谐波和电能质量审查、调试及书面项目验收。欧盟法规（EU）2016/631（RfG）适用于超过斯洛伐克阈值的装置。
summary.zht: 斯洛伐克電力供應系統在輸電層面由SEPS（斯洛伐克電力傳輸系統）運營，配電層面由各地區DSO（西斯洛伐克分銷、中斯洛伐克分銷、東斯洛伐克分銷）運營，均受ÚRSO（網絡行業監管辦公室）監管。低壓電網環境為230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz。其頻率與中國相同，但標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。併網充電樁項目應作為特定場址電氣安裝處理，需在通電前完成DSO供電容量審查、保護配合、計量、接地、諧波和電能質量審查、調試及書面項目驗收。歐盟法規（EU）2016/631（RfG）適用於超過斯洛伐克閾值的裝置。

standards_or_laws: SEPS (Slovak Electricity Transmission System) grid-connection technical requirements — https://www.sepsas.sk
DSO (Západoslovenská distribučná / Stredoslovenská distribučná / Východoslovenská distribučná) connection requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-1 — EV conductive charging system general requirements

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are commonly documented under GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connector standards, GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication, and local grid-operator acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz. The shared 50 Hz frequency does not mean voltage equivalence: Slovakia 230/400 V requires input-voltage, protection-threshold, thermal, and metering validation beyond the China baseline.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口标准、直流通信GB/T 27930-2023以及当地电网运营商验收准备文件。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz频率不等于电压等同：斯洛伐克230/400 V要求在中国基线之外重新确认输入电压、保护阈值、热设计和计量。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口標準、直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023以及當地電網運營商驗收準備文件。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。相同50 Hz頻率不等於電壓等同：斯洛伐克230/400 V要求在中國基線之外重新確認輸入電壓、保護閾值、熱設計和計量。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz, not only China's 220/380 V settings. Protection thresholds, leakage-current devices, metering accuracy, harmonic emissions, supply-capacity calculations, earthing, surge protection, and commissioning documents should be prepared for DSO/SEPS review. Slovak or EU-official-language documentation is typically required for DSO connection applications and building permits. For large installations interfacing with the Slovak transmission grid, SEPS technical requirements apply in addition to the EU RfG Regulation.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不仅是中国220/380 V设置。保护阈值、漏电保护器件、计量准确度、谐波排放、供电容量计算、接地、浪涌保护和调试文件应按DSO/SEPS审查准备。DSO并网申请和建筑许可通常需要提供斯洛伐克语或欧盟官方语言文件。对于与斯洛伐克输电网接口的大型装置，除欧盟RfG法规外，还须符合SEPS技术要求。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz，而不僅是中國220/380 V設置。保護閾值、漏電保護器件、計量準確度、諧波排放、供電容量計算、接地、浪湧保護和調試文件應按DSO/SEPS審查準備。DSO併網申請和建築許可通常需要提供斯洛伐克語或歐盟官方語言文件。對於與斯洛伐克輸電網接口的大型裝置，除歐盟RfG法規外，還須符合SEPS技術要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — grid-connected installations require DSO/SEPS project review and acceptance under ÚRSO framework; voltage is 230/400 V at 50 Hz, which differs from China 220/380 V despite the same frequency
mandatory_status.cn: China grid-operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a Slovak DSO/SEPS approval substitute; China 220/380 V evidence must be revalidated for Slovakia 230/400 V

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Slovakia-ready EVSE needs DSO/SEPS project acceptance and explicit 230/400 V 50 Hz validation. Do not describe the voltage as matching China: only the 50 Hz frequency matches, while nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline. Slovak or EU-official-language documentation is expected for permitting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向斯洛伐克的EVSE需要DSO/SEPS项目验收，并明确验证230/400 V 50 Hz。不得称其电压与中国相同：只有50 Hz频率相同，标称电压不同于中国220/380 V基线。许可申请需要提供斯洛伐克语或欧盟官方语言文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向斯洛伐克的EVSE需要DSO/SEPS項目驗收，並明確驗證230/400 V 50 Hz。不得稱其電壓與中國相同：只有50 Hz頻率相同，標稱電壓不同於中國220/380 V基線。許可申請需要提供斯洛伐克語或歐盟官方語言文件。
